column1: # CHANAKYA — VILLA METADATA TEMPLATE  |  one row per villa  |  used to create or update villa records
# Optional: everything else (sensible defaults will be used)
# Date format: DD-MMM-YY (e.g. 02-Apr-26).  YYYY-MM-DD and DD/MM/YYYY are also accepted.
# Dev defaults to "Amanvana" if blank.  Phase defaults to "Phase 1".
# Status accepts: Sold | Unsold | Reserved | Booked  (free text — anything is allowed; goes into notes if unrecognised)
# DELETE THESE COMMENT LINES BEFORE UPLOADING (any row starting with # is ignored on import — but cleaner files are easier to review).
